citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:31 PM on
3/25/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, speaking to a family member, and
calling all phone numbers on file. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation
of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:31 PM on 
3/25/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, speaking to a family member, and 
calling all phone numbers on file. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation 
of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
